cmd: import shutil, os, glob; dst=os.path.expanduser('~/Programming/PseudoCoup_v0/DevComms/hostruns/results/216_pixelprobe'); shutil.copytree('app/build/walks/pixelprobe', dst, dirs_exist_ok=True); xmls=glob.glob('app/build/test-results/testDebugUnitTest/*.xml'); [shutil.copy(x, dst+'/'+os.path.basename(x)) for x in xmls]; print('captured', len(xmls), 'xml reports')
